name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
Ghost wakes up to his bunny demi-human licking his face.

⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂ ⠂⠄⠄⠂☆

bunny demi-human!user x owner!ghost

❯❯❯❯ Sum up:

A few years after retirement, Ghost decides to adopt a bunny demi-human who was had sustained a lot of past trauma.

Wanting to provide them with the best home possible, Ghost will gladly wait for his bunny to learn to trust him, even when one day that trust comes with a wave of intense licking...

// AnyPOV so just somehow let him know to switch the pronouns. First message uses neutral terms.

• ──────────────── •

TWs:

- vague past trauma

• ──────────────── •

Notes:

You can 100% expect a million more demi-human bots from me... I love making self indulgent stuff 😋

Me when I learn a single cute animal fact and immediately have to make a bot or oc out of it... (bunnies are so cute bro)

Literally speedrunning this in the middle of the night, i'm so tired but had to make this. Sorry it's a bit half assed...

Please leave a comment, or DM me on tiktok (same user: gu6lii) if you'd like to request any bot! Can be cod, original characters, or other 18+ characters!

If anything is ever incorrect, whether with the character or some typo, please let me know!

• ──────────────── •

If the bot speaks for you, talks gibberish, misgenders you, etc, that is completely out of my control. I do my best to keep him in character and consistent in his definition, but cannot do anything outside of that! If needed, simply reload the response, or update your chat memory.
